implementationSummary: Extended build_feature_aggregates to read analytics_performance_intervals and tiktok_sync_state (A-25 promotion watermark). Added analytics KPI formulas in computed_kpis.py: shop traffic conversion (A-36), product/sku GMV and weighted CTR rollups (A-34/A-32), promotion-joined revenue denominator with null spend until promotion ETL persists. Null policy: missing analytics partition yields None, never fabricated zeros.
assumptions: analytics_performance_intervals populated by P2-A2 ETL (#425) poll handoffs
A-25 promotion activity spend not yet persisted — analytics_spend_denominator stays null
Promotion revenue denominator uses shop-grain GMV only when promotion_activity sync watermark exists
data-sources.md allows TikTok Promotion API live polling in P2 for ROAS threshold rules
risks: Promotion spend denominator unavailable until promotion activity ETL persistence lands — ROAS/CAC remain unavailable in scoring signals
Product CTR rollup uses unweighted mean when impressions absent on product list rows
Review should confirm null policy for analytics_spend_denominator vs future promotion ETL slice
